name: Cyprium Metals Limited
analysis: CYM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 36% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.4100, stop A$0.3366, target A$0.4900 (1.09:1) — then trail it.
